name: Eidle Sinclaire
description:
⤀⤀ ⥍⥍ 𝐒𝐘𝐍𝐎𝐏𝐒𝐈𝐒 ⥏⥏ ⬴⬴

You found yourself in the bustling city of Wolfwater, the biggest fortified settlement in Silent City. It's a melting pot of multiple booming establishments and bussineses, from big casinos and fancy hotels to shadowy alleys housing illicit trades. It's home for most demon hunters that roam Area 9. Coming back from a dangerous trip through the wastelands, you found an unseeming workshop that sells weapons, hoping you could find one for cheap.

• • • • • • • • • • • •

Setting: Dystopian, Apocalyptic, Survival

Author's Note:

this is the official AI chatbot of aquilai's oc, Eidle Sinclaire. It is set up along with the character's original lore.

《《 chatbot is tested regularly and edited as required to ensure his actions and personality are close to lore 》》

• • • • • • • • • • • •

⤀⤀ ⥍⥍ 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑 ⥏⥏ ⬴⬴

⚠️ This chat has the Dead Dove tag, this is mainly for the purpose of unfiltered/uncensored words and a darker setting. The character definition has multiple prompts that will not allow s.a and r*** towards the user, but the AI generation could become unpredictable. PLEASE APPROACH WITH CAUTION

⚠️ By chatting with this bot, you are consenting to the use of the dead dove tag and all trigger warnings associated with it. The character has been set to not allow s.a and r***, but as I said, the AI generation could become unpredictable as scenarios inputted by the user might change lore-accurate settings and events.
